hooks.command:
ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); SLUG=$(git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null | sed -E 's|.*github\.com[:/]||;s|\.git$||'); python3 -c 'import json,sys; r,s=sys.argv[1:]; print(json.dumps({"systemMessage": "DOTFILES CONTEXT
Source dir: "+r+"
Repo: github.com/"+s+"
Chezmoi source: chezmoi source-path

KEY INVARIANTS (never violate):
- No .tmpl files, no {{ if darwin }} blocks
- No .zshrc/.zprofile/Brewfile
- Credential helper must be !gh (not absolute path)
- No secrets or tokens
- install.sh must stay in .chezmoiignore

COMMON COMMANDS: /status /apply /add /verify-container"}))' "$ROOT" "$SLUG"

input=$(cat); cmd=$(printf '%s' "$input" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('command',''))"); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE '(--no-verify|git reset --hard|git clean -[fdx]|rm -rf)'; then printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"Dangerous destructive command blocked. Confirm intent with user before proceeding."}'; exit 2; fi

input=$(cat); path=$(printf '%s' "$input" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path','') or d.get('path',''))"); if printf '%s' "$path" | grep -qE '\.tmpl$'; then printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"Template files (.tmpl) are forbidden in this dotfiles repo. All files must be plain — no chezmoi templating, no platform switching."}'; exit 2; fi; if printf '%s' "$path" | grep -qE 'dot_zshrc|dot_zprofile|dot_bashrc|Brewfile'; then printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"Shell config files and Brewfiles are forbidden — this dotfiles repo is container-only. Shell setup is handled by devcontainer features."}'; exit 2; fi

SLUG=$(git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null | sed -E 's|.*github\.com[:/]||;s|\.git$||'); python3 -c 'import json,sys; s=sys.argv[1]; print(json.dumps({"systemMessage": "Before finishing:
1. Run: chezmoi status (must be empty)
2. Confirm changes committed and pushed to github.com/"+s+"
3. Verify no .tmpl files were added
4. Verify no macOS-specific content was added"}))' "$SLUG"
